title: Don & Chrissie Brown Online Benefit Auction
description: Don Brown is an iconic west coast horsemen, friend to many, and one of the best hackamore braiders of all time. I have been fortunate to call Don my friend for over 40 years. The life of a cowboy is not easy, and the years of of bronc riding, working on ranches, training and showing horse, and braiding rawhide has taken a toll on Don's body. At 88 years old, he is no longer able to work due to his ailments. We have organized this auction to benefit Don and his wife Chrissie through these challenging times! You can also donate to the GoFund here: https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-don-chrissie-brown Bid in the Auction Here: https://airauctioneer.com/don-chrissie-brown-benefit-auction

title: Help Don & Chrissie Brown
description: My longtime friend, Don Brown, is experiencing some major health issues. Please click the link below and consider donating to our GoFundMe to help support Don & Chrissie in their time of need! https://gofund.me/5056734e

description: Welcome and thanks for joining Team AD! I have compiled a list of essential skills that will help you in realizing your potential as a horseman or horsewoman. title: Reysed Rich
description: Reysed Rich 2014 Sorrel Gelding, NCHA LTE $45,000+ "Richie" is a winner in the Novice Open and Novice Non Pro. He is a big, strong gelding with a big sweep and stop. Originally trained by Spud Sheehan and currently in training with Al Dunning in Scottsdale, AZ. Sound, solid, $25K novice eligible and ready to show! Richie was a finalist in the Cattlemens Open and $100,000 Amateur Derby, NCHA $50,000 Amateur Futurity, PCCHA $100,000 Amateur Derby, Brazos Bash $100,000 Amateur Derby and most recently made the 2021 NCHA World Finals in the $5K Novice Non Pro. Sired by AQHA Hall of Fame and #2 All Time Leading Cutting Sire Dual Rey and out of $500,000+ producer Money Talks Smart, this is your next winner! Contact Al Dunning for more information: (480) 471-4600

title: Smooth Pistol Annie
description: 2011 AQHA Chestnut Mare "Annie" is a pretty, strong, quick and super cowy mare with great expression. Currently in training with Al Dunning in Scottsdale, AZ. Ready to show! Contact Al Dunning for more information: (480) 471-4600

title: Al Dunning & Winnie's Cookies: Promotional Video
description: The first time I was introduced to Winnie's Cookies I thought they were just a horse treat. After I found out that my horses loved Winnie's Cookies I did some research. I was impressed that these cookies were made from 12 certified organic ingredients and have no preservatives, chemicals or sugars. They are baked fresh and shipped to you the same day ordered. They also include flax seed which helps provide a healthy coat on my horses. They taste great and my horses benefit from their ingredients.
